Hidden settings / calibration
Eyes use the fitted capsule calibration. Use W/H to expand, Tilt to rotate, and Pinch to pull the capsule edges into a sharper eyelid shape. Click Boaz while editing to move the nearest eye.
Eye editor capsules visible while open
While editing is active, both capsule eyes are shown immediately.
Left eye independent capsule
Right eye independent capsule
Clock position + size
App settings saved locally
Calibration, mute, and glow are saved in this browser with localStorage. Share links support ?minutes=5 and ?preset=300.
